content_body: Mayfly is a beautifully appointed luxury cabin, the decor and amenities are fabulous. Great taste. Tony and I thoroughly enjoyed the peaceful getaway, especially the hot tub. Perfect weather and the temperature was just right. Thank you for providing a beautiful serene escape from our busy lives in the city. We will forever remember our first getaway together at Mayfly Treehouse. <3 Wendy and Tony
title: A Memory That Will Last Forever
